structure: SCOPE (Fountain/Ballpoint/Roller Ball/Mechanical/Multi/Calligraphy/Brush/Dip; NOT 毛筆/書道/インク単体/スタイラス)
GOALS (TRUTH FIRST + BOUNDARY RULE + IS block ban)
BOUNDARY RULE (毛筆→一般商品 STOP, Ink standalone STOP, Stylus STOP, Pen Stand STOP)
RULE 2 A/B/C (A=ABSOLUTE BAN, B=Source-confirmed including Maki-e/Sterling/Vintage, C=Always-use facts)

bootleg_4_layers.IP_specific_HIGH_4: Pre-1960s Montblanc 149/146 / Vintage Pelikan 100/100N / Vintage Parker 51/21 / Vintage Sheaffer Snorkel

key_implementations.cannot_list_output: Title: [Cannot list] / Description: This item appears to be an unlicensed/counterfeit/bootleg writing instrument. Cannot be listed on eBay due to potential VeRO violation. / ProductName: [Cannot list] / Category: N/A
key_implementations.absolute_ban_10_terms: Bootleg / KO / Knock-off / Replica / Counterfeit / Fake / Unofficial / Unlicensed / Authentic (standalone) / Official (standalone)
key_implementations.title_priority_system: Required: Brand → Model/Series → Type; Additional: Maki-e/Material → Nib (18K M Nib) → Filling System → Edition → Era → Country
key_implementations.maki_e_source_only: 5 explicit rules — 蒔絵/漆/artist name in source required; DO NOT infer from visual pattern
key_implementations.vintage_source_only: Source must confirm era (decade/昭和/year); DO NOT auto-assign from brand/model name
key_implementations.sterling_silver_source_only: 純銀/純金/sterling in source required; DO NOT infer from model number

condition_2_axes.functional: Writes Smoothly / Ink Flow Good / Hard Starting / Skipping / Filling Mechanism Working / Filling Issue / Tested-Working / For Parts
condition_2_axes.cosmetic: Mint / Excellent / VG / Good / Fair / Poor / Scratches / Plating Wear / Maki-e Chipping / Body Discoloration / Celluloid Yellowing / Ebonite Oxidation
